title: tornelia fragrans
intro: Tornelia fragrans, also known as Sweet Anemone or Carrot Flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tornelia fragrans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tornelia fragrans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address a range of health concerns, from minor skin irritations to more serious health issues.
